action.reasoning: Starting from empty workspace. Need to build full pipeline: dataset, model (SegFormer B5), train script with DDP on 4 GPUs, predict script. First iteration will train 5 epochs and submit eval to measure time and get baseline mIoU. Using pre-downloaded 'nvidia/mit-b5' from transformers, ImageNet normalization, random crop 512, poly lr schedule. Will log metrics to jsonl for training curves.
